commit.message: increase minimum supported Rust version from 1.77.0 to 1.85.0 (required for edition2024 required by crate `rand`)
CI: fix bug: only install cargo-fuzz if not already installed in cache
fix regression from upgrading `rand` dependency: further occurences of `thread_rng` are renamed to `rng` (https://rust-random.github.io/book/update-0.9.html)
fix regression from upgrading `rand` dependency: further occurences of `thread_rng` are renamed to `rng` (https://rust-random.github.io/book/update-0.9.html)
crate ctrl-async has been renamed to ctrlc
fix another regression from upgrading rand which was hidden behind a feature flag
